notes: Anchors are selected from public structural metadata only; algorithm outcomes are not available to the selector.
Each fixed fixture is rerun under 200 fresh method-specific measurement seeds.
The fixture is the independent experimental unit; repeated seeds are not pooled as independent instances.
One-sided exact lower bounds use Bonferroni family-wise alpha across every anchor-method calibration gate.
The panel executes no LLM, commercial API, quantum circuit backend, or hardware.
Finite fixed-fixture calibration does not replace a worst-case fixed-confidence theorem.
